items.title: Bluesky CEO Jay Graber will step aside

items.title: LEGO welcomes spring with two GWPs + 3x Insiders Points on select sets through the week
items.summary:
Ahead of MAR10 Day 2026 and running through March 16, LEGO is welcoming the spring season with two GWPs alongside 3x Insiders Points on select building sets. Folks are still jumping on the new wave of 43 sets that released at the top of the month, and we’ve already seen some pre-MAR10 Day LEGO set deals over at Amazon, which are still live and ready to pick up. Head below to get the rundown on these two new GWPs – one being the second-ever Botanicals GWP set, while the other is a cute Easter-themed tote bag – as well as browse the lineup of select sets that are benefitting from the 3x Insider Points promotion.

items.title: Score the luck of the Irish with Lectric’s St. Paddy’s Day Sale and up to $694 e-bike savings starting from $799
items.summary:
Update 3/9: Lectric has cut the price on the standard step-thru XPeak2 and high-step XPeak2 e-bikes to $1,399 shipped during this sale

Lectric is helping you find your commuting pot of gold with its newly launched St. Paddy’s Day Sale that is taking up to $694 off its popular e-bikes and bundled gear. For folks looking to do their rainbow hunting off-road this spring, look no further than Lectric’s XPeak2 Long-Range e-bikes that come with $400 in FREE gear, in either a step-thru design at $1,699 shipped or a high-step design at $1,699 shipped. There’s also the standard step-thru XPeak2 and high-step XPeak2 e-bike options at $1,499 $1,399 shipped, which come with lesser bundles of $336 in FREE gear. Depending on which you choose, you’d be paying either $2,099 or $1,746 for these e-bike packages without the usual savings on the bundled gear. These bundles break down to include a rear cargo rack, a fender set, and an Elite headlight upgrade for the standard models, while the long-range models get those alongside a suspension seat post and water-resistant pannier bags. Head below to learn more and browse the entire e-bike lineup during this sale event.

more…

items.title: This Turtle Beach Kone XP Air gaming mouse comes with a gorgeous RGB charging dock at new $65 all-time low (50% off)
items.summary:
We’re now tracking a deal at Amazon that drops Turtle Beach’s Kone XP Air wireless gaming mouse in white down to $64.99 shipped. That’s a straight-up 50% discount from the $130 price it has lately been carrying. The mouse first dropped to this price last month, and today’s offer brings that $65 discount back. You can also get this in black, although it’s currently fetching its full $130 price. This model is essentially the same ROCCAT Kone XP Air gaming mouse that Turtle Beach rebranded after acquiring the ROCCAT brand. It never dropped below the $90 mark while being sold under the ROCCAT brand, so you’re still looking at the lowest price we have tracked for this model to date. Head below for more details.
